title: tarenna gyokushinkwa var. yaeyamensis
intro: Tarenna gyokushinkwa var. yaeyamensis, also known as Yaeyama Goldthread, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Yaeyama Goldthread include reducing fever, improving digestion, and relieving pain, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and infections.
